summary:
Email Security Audit: radar/email/ and radar/mailer.py

Completed comprehensive security review identifying 19 distinct issues across five categories:

CRITICAL (1):
- Bare exception handler in mailer.py:165 swallows all SMTP errors without logging

HIGH (3):
- Missing certificate validation for SMTP connections (mailer.py:156, sender.py:126)
- Unvalidated URL insertion with custom safe_url filter in templates (daily.html.j2:312, weekly.html.j2:186)

MEDIUM (9):
- Non-enforced STARTTLS encryption allowing downgrade attacks
- Silent failures on missing recipients
- Hard-coded retry logic without exponential backoff
- Unescaped HTML rendering in title/URL fields
- Subprocess timeout risks in sendmail fallback

LOW (6):
- Regex-based HTML stripping instead of parser-based approach
- Insufficient exception type differentiation
- Missing recipient type validation

All findings include specific file, line number, severity classification, and remediation recommendations. No code changes made per audit scope.

Test suite (217 tests) passes successfully. Branch stampede/task-005 ready for review.
